description: openaiops-platform feature ledger. Cross-session contract; status transitions are real product gates.
source: Pivoted from archived OpenAIOps repo per its ADR-0007 (2026-05-24).

history.event: Repo created + features.json with SLICE-0 (status: building)
SLICE-0 done — CI green, 8/8 ACs verified (AC-7 partial: goose down not auto-tested)
PRE-1 resolved — ADR-0002 chose ch-migrate service (Option B); scaffold landed + smoke verified
PRE-2 resolved — ADR-0003 chose split cmd/query/ (Option B) under Heavy-soon workload assumption; spec + ADR landed, no code changes yet
PRE-3 resolved — chquery package (MustTenantScope helper + Conn wrapper) + Row Policy template + prod CH custom_settings config + build-time lint. SLICE-1 unblocked. 7 commits 80344d7..ce7ed1b.

SLICE-1 spec landed (docs/specs/2026-05-25-slice-1-trace-design.md) — brainstormed Bearer-on-receiver tenant trust + ingester-as-OTLP-receiver (Collector out of data path) + chquery.Batch wrapper closing SLICE-1-PREP-1. AC #1/#3/#7/#9 evolved (see acceptance_criteria below). Next: writing-plans for docs/plans/2026-05-25-slice-1-plan.md.

SLICE-1 done — 16 tasks, ~27 commits, 10/10 ACs verified. Three bugs caught + fixed during execution (ingester IncludeMetadata both transports; CH replay-safety; frontend nginx /api/v1/traces routing). See deploy/SLICE-1-evidence.txt.
SLICE-1-PREP-1 resolved — chquery.Conn.PrepareBatch + *chquery.Batch wrapper landed in commit 1a00986; tenant pinned at PrepareBatch time, smoke-verified with TestSmoke_BatchTenantIsolation.

SLICE-2 spec landed (docs/specs/2026-05-26-slice-2-log-design.md) — brainstormed binary split (cmd/log-ingester own ports 4327/4328/8083), first-class trace_id+span_id correlation, drift D4 routing consolidation, body substring via positionUTF8 (no text index), packaging B (span scoping + JSON pretty-print). 10 ACs. Next: writing-plans for docs/plans/2026-05-26-slice-2-plan.md.

SLICE-2 execution started — status proposed → building. Subagent-driven mode per docs/plans/2026-05-26-slice-2-plan.md (e1fafa0). 14 tasks; fresh implementer per task + 2-stage review (spec → code quality).

SLICE-2 done — 14 tasks, all 10 ACs verified. Log vertical: cmd/log-ingester → CH logs_v1 (Row Policy) → /api/v1/logs → /logs page + /traces/:id Logs subtab. Drift D4 closed: nginx /api blocks deleted, Caddy sole ingress. Playwright D4 regression locks the architectural guard. 5 bugs caught during execution. See deploy/SLICE-2-evidence.txt.

SLICE-3 spec landed (docs/specs/2026-05-27-slice-3-services-topology-design.md) — brainstormed 7 design choices: 1min topo-engine background job → 2 tables (topology_edges_v1 + service_stats_v1) with ReplacingMergeTree+FINAL idempotency; full UI scope (Overview cards + Service detail + /topology + /traces/:id Service Map body) MINUS ⌘K which de-scoped to SLICE-3.5; d3-force + hand-rolled SVG (consistent with SLICE-1 waterfall); external nodes via peer.service/db.system/messaging.system/http.host COALESCE; fixed-bucket time window 15m/1h/6h/24h; per-trace Service Map = client-side derive (zero new endpoint). 4th binary cmd/topo-engine on :8084; 2 new Caddy handles; zero nginx change (D4 still closed). 10 ACs. Next: writing-plans for docs/plans/2026-05-27-slice-3-plan.md.

features.title: Foundation — repo skeleton + docker-compose stack + multi-tenant gateway shell

evidence.ac_summary: 8 ACs total: 7 PASS + 1 PARTIAL (AC-7: goose down rollback exists as SQL but not auto-tested in CI; manually verifiable via `goose -dir backend/migrations postgres ... down`).
evidence.spec_compliance_runs: 8 spec reviews + 7 code quality reviews dispatched during execution; 1 review-driven fix loop on T1 (vendor gitignore + seed/smoke README accuracy) and 4 CI iteration cycles on T14.
bugs_caught_during_execution: T13 nginx.conf missing /api proxy block — would have silently 'authenticated' with empty tenant data; caught when CI E2E ran
T14 NaiveUI NInput wraps actual <input> in a div with data-testid; tests needed .locator('input') to drill in
T14 Node 25 stripped Storage.clear(); jsdom shim added

features.current_state: Empty repo just created. No code, no infra, no auth.
features.target_state: Engineer can `docker-compose up`, get a stack with PG/Redis/CH/Collector/Caddy/gateway/frontend; curl `/healthz` with a Bearer key returns tenant_id; browser shows Login page (中/英 switchable); CI green.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose up brings stack to healthy state (all services)
curl with valid Bearer API key on /healthz returns 200 + tenant_id JSON
curl without / with wrong key returns 401
two tenants seeded; each key resolves to its own tenant (no cross-talk)
Login page renders in zh-CN by default; can switch to en-US
After login, Home page shows tenant name in top bar
goose migrate up creates 3 tables; down rolls back cleanly
GitHub Actions CI (backend / frontend-unit / e2e) is green on push
out_of_scope: Trace / Log / Metric ingestion (Slice 1-4)
Topology / Service detail / Alerts (Slice 3-4)
AI agents / RCA (Phase 2 sibling repo openaiops-ai)
OIDC / JWT auth (v1.0)
Production hardening (TLS termination beyond local Caddy, observability of platform itself, etc.)
features.actual_effort_session: 1 autonomous subagent-driven session (~3h wall time, 14 task implementer + 11 reviewer + 2 fixer subagent dispatches)
features.notes: All 14 tasks in the plan traced to this single feature (per harness-engineering subagent grounding rule). Future slices (SLICE-1 Trace E2E etc.) will get their own feature entries. See ADR-0001 §5 for the slice roadmap.
slice_1_prerequisites: PRE-1 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: ClickHouse schema migration mechanism — Option B (dedicated ch-migrate service) per ADR-0002. Scaffold + smoke verified.

PRE-2 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: Query API deployment shape — Option B (split cmd/query/ from day 1) per ADR-0003, under Heavy-soon workload assumption. Spec + ADR landed; scaffolding deferred to SLICE-1 T1-T3 sequenced after PRE-3.

PRE-3 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: chquery.MustTenantScope + chquery.Conn (clickhouse-go/v2 wrapper) + Row Policy template (backend/ch-migrations/README.md) + prod CH custom_settings_prefixes config (deploy/clickhouse-custom-settings.xml) + build-time lint (make lint-ch). Cross-tenant reverse E2E (3rd layer of ADR-0001 §3.3) is SLICE-1 AC #8.

features.title: Trace ingest 端到端 — ingester (OTLP receiver) + CH traces_v1 + cmd/query + Traces page

evidence.ac_summary: 10/10 ACs verified. AC #2/#6 via migrate-ch-up + system.row_policies. AC #1/#3/#4/#5/#9 via Go unit + integration tests. AC #7 via Playwright traces.spec.ts (4 specs PASS in 3.0s). AC #8 via cross_tenant_test.go (8 sub-tests = 6 AC + 2 HTTP regression). AC #10 via .github/workflows/ci.yml (4 jobs).
bugs_caught_during_execution: T4/T10/T13 — ingester OTel receiver dropped Bearer headers on BOTH gRPC and HTTP unless `IncludeMetadata: true` is set on each protocol slot. Hot-rod masked the gRPC failure (HTTP-only); cross_tenant_test.go locks both transports.
T1 — CH migration replay-safety: CREATE TABLE and CREATE ROW POLICY must use IF NOT EXISTS so the runner can re-apply after a partial-state crash without a hard error.
T8 review — empty list serialized as JSON null (frontend breakage); fixed by make([]TraceListItem, 0).

T16 — frontend/nginx.conf only proxied /api/* to gateway; the new query-side prefix /api/v1/traces was reachable through Caddy (443) but not through the frontend host port (13000), so the SPA on its own port returned nginx 404. Caught by the first Playwright run; fixed by mirroring Caddy's split in nginx.conf. Tracked as drift D4 for SLICE-2 consolidation.

features.current_state: Slice 0 stack runs; no CH tables; no /api/v1/traces endpoint; frontend Traces page does not exist. cmd/query and cmd/ingester binaries do not yet exist. chquery.Conn does not yet expose PrepareBatch (SLICE-1-PREP-1).
features.target_state: telemetrygen / hot-r.o.d. → ingester (OTLP/gRPC :4317 + OTLP/HTTP :4318, Bearer-on-receiver) → CH traces_v1 (tenant-scoped, Row Policy active) → curl /api/v1/traces returns list + waterfall JSON via cmd/query :8081 → frontend /traces page renders list + detail waterfall + JSON. Cross-tenant reverse Go integration test asserts tenant B cannot see tenant A's traces.
acceptance_criteria: ingester OTLP receiver reads Authorization: Bearer <api-key> from gRPC metadata / HTTP header; resolves via auth.PGResolver to obtain authoritative tenant_id; rejects missing or invalid Bearer with 401 + ingester_auth_{missing,invalid}_total counter. SDK-declared tenant.id resource attribute is dropped (cannot be spoofed). [evolved from original Collector-processor framing during 2026-05-25 brainstorming]

CH traces_v1 table created (tenant_id LowCardinality(String), trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service, operation, ts DateTime64(9), duration UInt64, status, span_kind, resource_attributes Map(LowCardinality(String),String), attributes Map(LowCardinality(String),String)); ORDER BY (tenant_id, service, ts) PARTITION BY (tenant_id, toYYYYMMDD(ts)); INDEX idx_trace_id bloom_filter; Row Policy tenant_isolation_traces_v1 attached

Go ingester service is itself the OTLP receiver (gRPC :4317 + HTTP :4318, embeds go.opentelemetry.io/collector/receiver/otlpreceiver); writes batches to CH traces_v1 via chquery.PrepareBatch; tenant_id is server-stamped after PG resolve (not propagated from any upstream). Collector is removed from data path. [evolved from original 'receives OTLP from Collector' framing]

Query API: GET /api/v1/traces (list with filters: service/operation/ts_from/ts_to/min_duration_ms, sort ts|duration, limit/offset, has_more pagination) + GET /api/v1/traces/{trace_id} (flat span list for waterfall; 404 if not present under tenant). Both routes live on cmd/query :8081 behind Caddy /api/v1/traces* prefix handle

All Query API SQL goes through chquery.Conn (MustTenantScope helper for Query/Exec; PrepareBatch wrapper for batch writes); make lint-ch CI step rejects bare clickhouse-go imports outside internal/chquery (already enforced from PRE-3 + automatically covers new internal/ingest/ + internal/query/)
ClickHouse Row Policy tenant_isolation_traces_v1 enforces tenant_id = getSetting('custom_tenant_id') at CH level (defense-in-depth on top of builder)

Frontend /traces page (Vue): list view (sortable ts/duration via NDataTable, filter bar) + detail waterfall (hand-rolled SVG, no D3) + JSON subtab. Service Map subtab is a 'Coming in SLICE-3' placeholder; the real force-directed graph component is co-designed with SLICE-3 global topology. [evolved — Service Map subtab body deferred to SLICE-3]

Cross-tenant reverse test as Go integration test (build tag integration) in backend/internal/ingest/cross_tenant_test.go: tenant A ingests via OTLP/gRPC with key-acme, tenant B queries with key-beta → 0 list results + 404 on detail; missing/garbage Bearer → 401; tenant A's own queries see correct counts. Six sub-assertions total.

Per-OTLP-Export-call metering event written to PG metering_events (tenant_id, signal_type='trace', count=spans_in_batch). Write is best-effort: CH commit returns OK to SDK regardless; PG metering failure increments ingester_metering_failed_total + slog.Error. Retry queue is post-SLICE-1. [evolved — best-effort policy made explicit]

Slice 1 CI matrix: backend-unit (existing + new chquery.Batch / internal/ingest / internal/query unit tests) + backend-integration NEW job (-tags=integration -timeout=240s; runs all dockertest suites including cross_tenant) + frontend-unit (+ new Traces vitest specs) + e2e (with new make seed-traces helper + traces.spec.ts Playwright) + lint-ch unchanged
out_of_scope: Log ingest (SLICE-2)
Topology / Service detail page (SLICE-3); Service Map subtab body lives there
Metrics ingest + Alerts (SLICE-4)
Sampling decisions (Slice 5+ — for now ingest 100%)
Trace search via attribute index (post-MVP — for now ts-range scan)
AsyncInsert / column-mode batch on chquery.Batch (add when throughput data demands)
Cursor pagination on /api/v1/traces (offset paging ships with documented streaming-drift limitation)
OTLP events / links columns on traces_v1 (cross-jump to logs in SLICE-2 is the planned mitigation)
Proactive 501 stubs for /api/v1/logs|services|topology routes (future slices add their own one-line Caddy handle per CLAUDE.md routing rule)
Collector custom processor (Collector removed from data path entirely; users wanting Collector-style enrichment run their own pointing at ingester:4317)
PGResolver hot-path optimization (Slice 0 known_drift D1 still applies; mitigation if ingester throughput > ~50 req/s)
features.notes: First vertical slice (Path B). Spec landed 2026-05-25 after brainstorming session; 4 ACs evolved (see acceptance_criteria entries tagged [evolved ...]). Brainstorming closed open task SLICE-1-PREP-1 (chquery.Conn batch path) by deciding to extend the wrapper rather than open a lint exception — implementation tracked in spec §4. Per Slice 0 plan §5 + lessons (docs/lessons-learned-2026-05-24.md): apply Slice 0 NaiveUI test-selector + nginx /api proxy discipline + Go-version pinning. Plan to use telemetrygen for CI determinism + hot-r.o.d. (--profile demo) for manual visual demo.

features.title: Log ingest 端到端 — cmd/log-ingester (OTLP receiver) + CH logs_v1 + /api/v1/logs + /logs page with cross-jump

evidence.ac_summary: 10/10 ACs verified. AC #2/#6 via CH migration apply + system.row_policies (tenant_isolation_logs_v1 confirmed). AC #1/#3/#5/#8 via Go unit + integration tests (TestSlice2_CrossTenantLogs 8 sub-assertions + TestLogsToRows unit tests). AC #4 via logs_handler_test + logs_repo_test + live curl (10 items returned, beta 0 items). AC #7 via Playwright logs.spec.ts (5/5 PASS in 3.0s) + vitest 52 tests PASS. AC #9 via TestSlice2_MeteringSignalLog integration test (signal_type='log' confirmed). AC #10 via nginx.conf /api blocks deleted + Playwright D4 regression assertion (Content-Type: text/html, no 'items' key) + CI matrix updated.
bugs_caught_during_execution: T2 — ingestshared extraction: cmd/ingester imported internal/ingest directly; refactor required careful dep-graph pruning to avoid circular import.
T5 — bodyAsString for plog.ValueTypeMap returned Go-syntax string via .AsString(); needed JSON marshal. Test coverage added for all 6 value type branches.
T7 — body_contains filter used LIKE initially; spec requires positionUTF8. Caught in review; fixed before merge.
T9/T10 — LogsPanel double-fetch: apply()→router.replace→watch→load() double-fetch loop. Fixed by suppressNextWatch flag pattern (same as TracesList). Caught in T9 review.
T11 — Cross-tenant sub2/sub3 passed vacuously: ingest call was inside t.Run for sub1, so sub2/sub3 had no data to deny. Fixed by hoisting ingest before all t.Runs (commit 7ce9741).

features.current_state: SLICE-1 done; trace vertical works (cmd/ingester → traces_v1 → cmd/query → /traces). No log ingest path; no CH logs_v1; no /api/v1/logs route; no /logs frontend; cmd/log-ingester binary does not exist. Drift D4 (Caddy + nginx duplicated routing) still open.
features.target_state: SDK / telemetrygen-logs → cmd/log-ingester (OTLP/gRPC :4327 + OTLP/HTTP :4328 /v1/logs, Bearer-on-receiver) → CH logs_v1 (tenant-scoped, Row Policy active) → curl /api/v1/logs with structured filters via cmd/query :8081 → frontend /logs page with severity badges + cross-jump trace_id/span_id chips + JSON body pretty-print. /traces/:id gains a Logs subtab; clicking a span narrows to that span_id. Cross-tenant Go integration test (8 sub-assertions) asserts tenant B cannot see tenant A logs. Drift D4 closed: nginx /api blocks removed; Caddy becomes sole ingress.
acceptance_criteria: cmd/log-ingester embeds otlpreceiver (gRPC :4327 + HTTP :4328 /v1/logs, IncludeMetadata: true on BOTH transports day 1); reads Authorization: Bearer <api-key>; resolves via auth.PGResolver; server-stamps tenant_id; drops SDK-declared tenant.id resource attribute; rejects missing/invalid with 401 + log_ingester_auth_{missing,invalid}_total counter

CH logs_v1 table created (tenant_id LowCardinality first; ts/observed_ts DateTime64(9); service/severity_text LowCardinality; severity_number UInt8; body String ZSTD(3); trace_id/span_id String with bloom_filter index; trace_flags UInt8; resource_attributes + attributes Map(LC(String),String); minmax index on severity_number); ORDER BY (tenant_id, service, ts); PARTITION BY (tenant_id, toYYYYMMDD(ts)); Row Policy tenant_isolation_logs_v1 attached

internal/logingest.LogConsumer writes batches via chquery.PrepareBatch (*chquery.Batch pins tenant_id at prepare time; first Append arg auto-validated); bodyAsString helper JSON-encodes Map/Slice bodies, AsString for primitives

GET /api/v1/logs on cmd/query :8081 with filters: service (repeated), severity (repeated), ts_from/ts_to (with +1s lookahead drift D1 mitigation), trace_id, span_id, body_contains (positionUTF8), limit/offset; response includes has_more via limit+1 trick; behind Caddy /api/v1/logs* handle

All Query + ingester SQL through chquery.Conn (auto-prepends tenant_id from ctx; never a client URL param); make lint-ch rejects bare clickhouse-go imports outside internal/chquery (already enforced; automatically covers new internal/logingest/ + internal/query/logs_*.go)
Row Policy tenant_isolation_logs_v1 enforces tenant_id = getSetting(custom_tenant_id) at CH level (defense-in-depth on top of MustTenantScope)

Frontend /logs page: list + expand-row JSON (JSON.parse pretty-print of body per packaging B); SeverityBadge component; filter bar (URL is source of truth); /traces/:id gains a Logs subtab via LogsPanel calling /api/v1/logs?trace_id=X; clicking a span in the waterfall narrows to ?trace_id=X&span_id=Y (per packaging B); reverse cross-jump: trace_id/span_id chips in log rows link to /traces/:trace_id?focus_span=Y

Cross-tenant E2E (build tag integration, backend/internal/logingest/cross_tenant_test.go): 8 sub-assertions — A→ingest counts match, B→list read denied, B→trace_id cross-jump denied, A→own trace_id read, A→span_id scoping, gRPC missing-Bearer 401, HTTP missing-Bearer 401 (regression — SLICE-1 T13 IncludeMetadata lesson), garbage-Bearer query 401

Per-OTLP-Export-call metering event written to PG metering_events with signal_type=log, count=records_in_batch; best-effort (CH commit returns OK regardless); log_ingester_metering_failed_total counter for PG failures

Routing consolidated to Caddy-only ingress (drift D4 closed): frontend/nginx.conf /api/* and /api/v1/traces* blocks removed; Caddy gets one new /api/v1/logs* handle; Vite dev proxy + Playwright baseURL repointed to https://localhost (ignoreHTTPSErrors); regression assertion in logs.spec.ts that http://localhost:13000/api/v1/logs returns 404. CI matrix updated: backend-unit (new internal/logingest + internal/query unit tests), backend-integration (new cross-tenant + chtest reuse), frontend-unit (new logs.test.ts + SeverityBadge.test.ts + LogRow.test.ts), e2e (new make seed-logs + logs.spec.ts); lint-ch unchanged
out_of_scope: Log retention / TTL (admin concern; SLICE-3+ when tenant settings UI lands)
Full-text body search via tokenbf_v1 / ngrambf_v1 index (revisit when query patterns are real)
Log↔trace bidirectional graph UI (ship cross-jump links + tabs, not a unified timeline view)
OTLP log events / structured normalization (treated as plain body + attributes in v1)
Log-based metrics / extracted spans (post-MVP)
Sampling decisions on logs (ingest 100% in v1)
AsyncInsert / column-mode batch on chquery.Batch (add when throughput data demands)
Cursor pagination on /api/v1/logs (offset paging ships with documented streaming-drift limitation, symmetric to SLICE-1)
Proactive 501 stubs for /api/v1/services|topology|alerts routes (future slices add their own one-line Caddy handle)
Real /api/v1/services endpoint for the filter bar (SLICE-3; SLICE-2 uses type-your-own or auto-suggest-from-recent placeholder)
features.notes: Second vertical slice. Same Bearer-on-receiver pattern as SLICE-1; binary split (new cmd/log-ingester) decided this session — symmetric to PRE-2 cmd/query split for independent blast radius. Internal package refactor: extract internal/ingestshared/ (admin, auth, host, metering, metrics) so internal/ingest/ stays trace-only and new internal/logingest/ stays log-only. Drift D4 bundled: nginx /api blocks deleted, Caddy becomes sole ingress (closes 2026-05-26 lessons-learned D4). Packaging B chosen — adds span-granularity scoping (?span_id=X) and JSON body pretty-print on top of the minimal mirror-SLICE-1 baseline.

features.title: Services + Topology — cmd/topo-engine + 2 CH aggregation tables + 3 new Query API endpoints + 4 new frontend pages
features.current_state: SLICE-2 done; trace + log verticals work. No service-to-service edge derivation; no per-service RED aggregation; topology_edges_v1 and service_stats_v1 tables don't exist; no /api/v1/services or /api/v1/topology routes; no /overview, /services/:name, or /topology frontend pages; /traces/:id Service Map subtab is a 'Coming in SLICE-3' NEmpty placeholder; SideBar overview/services/topology entries are to:null. cmd/topo-engine binary does not exist; chquery.AdminConn does not exist.
features.target_state: cmd/topo-engine runs as 4th docker-compose service on :8084 admin; every 1min processes the latest closed bucket [T-2min, T-1min); reads traces_v1 via SELF JOIN; writes topology_edges_v1 (per pair) + service_stats_v1 (per service x span_kind). Cold-start Catchup replays missing buckets up to TOPO_CATCHUP_MAX=1h gap. cmd/query :8081 gains /api/v1/services (list+RED), /api/v1/services/{name} (stats+inbound+outbound deps), /api/v1/topology (nodes+edges for force-directed graph). Caddy adds 2 handle blocks (zero nginx change). Frontend ships /overview (service cards, RED color rings), /services/:name (NTabs: Signals + Dependencies + 4 ComingSoonTab placeholders), /topology (global force-directed graph via d3-force + hand-rolled SVG, ≤100 nodes), /traces/:id Service Map subtab body (client-side derived from in-memory spans). Shared <ServiceGraph> component reused 3 places. ?window= URL param drives 15m/1h/6h/24h fixed buckets across all 3 new pages. SideBar overview/services/topology entries enabled. Cross-tenant integration test (6 sub-assertions) asserts tenant B cannot see tenant A's services or topology.
acceptance_criteria: cmd/topo-engine on :8084 admin port; every 1min processes closed bucket [T-2min, T-1min); cold-start Catchup replays missing buckets capped at TOPO_CATCHUP_MAX (default 1h); per-tenant errgroup limit TOPO_TENANT_CONCURRENCY (default 4); single-tenant failure does not abort tick; topo_engine_bucket_lag_seconds gauge + topo_engine_tick_failed_total + topo_engine_tenant_failed_total{tenant_id} counters exposed at :8084/metrics; /healthz returns 200 once Catchup completes + at least one tick has run

CH topology_edges_v1 table (tenant_id LowCardinality first; ts_bucket DateTime with Delta+ZSTD; caller_service/caller_kind/callee_service/callee_kind LowCardinality(String); calls/errors/p95_duration UInt64 T64+LZ4; ENGINE=ReplacingMergeTree; ORDER BY (tenant_id, ts_bucket, caller_service, callee_service, callee_kind); PARTITION BY (tenant_id, toYYYYMMDD(ts_bucket))); Row Policy tenant_isolation_topology_edges_v1 attached with USING tenant_id = getSetting('custom_tenant_id') TO openaiops

CH service_stats_v1 table (tenant_id LowCardinality first; ts_bucket DateTime with Delta+ZSTD; service/span_kind LowCardinality(String); calls/errors/p95_duration UInt64; ENGINE=ReplacingMergeTree; ORDER BY (tenant_id, ts_bucket, service, span_kind)); Row Policy tenant_isolation_service_stats_v1 attached

internal/topoengine.Engine.RunOnce(ctx, bucket) runs two Passes per tenant: Pass A writes topology_edges_v1 (LEFT JOIN traces_v1 self with SETTINGS join_use_nulls=1 so IS NULL checks fire; internal edge when a.service IS NOT NULL AND a.service != b.service [caller=a.service, callee=b.service, callee_kind=service]; external edge when b.span_kind='Client' AND b.parent_span_id != '' AND (a.service IS NULL OR a.service = b.service) AND has peer attribute [caller=b.service, callee derived from nullIf+coalesce over peer.service / db.system / messaging.system / http.host / 'unknown-external', callee_kind=external]; multiIf branches on the same internal-vs-external predicate for caller_service / callee_service / callee_kind to ensure consistency); Pass B writes service_stats_v1 (GROUP BY service, span_kind). Both Passes use chquery.Conn (Layer 1 SQL WHERE tenant_id + Layer 2 Row Policy + Layer 3 chquery custom_tenant_id setting). New chquery.AdminConn type bypasses MustTenantScope for whitelisted SQL (AdminListTenants, AdminMaxBucket); make lint-ch rule extended to forbid chquery.AdminConn construction outside internal/topoengine/

GET /api/v1/services on cmd/query :8081 with window enum 15m|1h|6h|24h (handler whitelist → INTERVAL N MINUTE/HOUR); returns items[].{service, inbound_calls, inbound_errors, inbound_error_rate, inbound_p95_ms, outbound_calls}; sumIf/maxIf over service_stats_v1 FINAL filtered by span_kind='Server' for inbound and 'Client' for outbound; HAVING inbound_calls>0 OR outbound_calls>0; ORDER BY inbound_calls DESC; LIMIT default 100 max 500

GET /api/v1/services/{name}?window=... returns stats.{inbound, outbound} + dependencies.{inbound[], outbound[]}; self stats from service_stats_v1 FINAL grouped by span_kind; inbound deps from topology_edges_v1 FINAL where callee_service=name AND callee_kind='service'; outbound deps from topology_edges_v1 FINAL where caller_service=name; each dependencies array LIMIT 50; 404 when service has neither stats nor edges in window

GET /api/v1/topology?window=...&node_limit=N returns nodes[].{service, kind, calls, errors, p95_ms} + edges[].{caller, callee, callee_kind, calls, errors, p95_ms}; top_services CTE filters by sum(calls) DESC LIMIT node_limit (default 100, max 300); external nodes (callee_kind='external') never truncated; empty window returns 200 + {nodes:[], edges:[]}

Caddy gets /api/v1/services* + /api/v1/topology* handle blocks (uri strip_prefix /api + reverse_proxy query:8081) listed before catch-all /api/* handle; zero changes to frontend/nginx.conf (drift D4 closed in SLICE-2 holds); CLAUDE.md port table updated to add 8084 topo-engine canonical port; deploy/.env.example adds TOPO_ENGINE_ADMIN_HOST_PORT=8084

Frontend ships 4 pages: /overview (ServiceCard grid with RED color ring, NTabs window picker), /services/:name (NTabs shell with SignalsTab + DependenciesTab + 4 ComingSoonTab placeholders for Runtime/Exceptions/Settings/Alerts), /topology (TopologyPage with shared <ServiceGraph>, ≤100 nodes), /traces/:id Service Map subtab body (ServiceMapPanel.vue client-side derives nodes+edges from already-loaded spans via Vue computed, zero backend call, zero external node inference). Shared <ServiceGraph> component reused in all 3 graph locations (uses d3-force ~30KB gz simulation + hand-rolled Vue SVG render). <TimeWindowPicker> URL ?window= as single source of truth + suppressNextWatch composable pattern (SLICE-2 LogsPanel T9/T10 lesson reused). SideBar overview/services/topology entries change from to:null to real paths (services entry shares /overview).

Cross-tenant integration test (backend/internal/topoengine/cross_tenant_test.go, build tag integration): 6 sub-assertions — A sees own topology with checkout/redis nodes, B sees own topology with mobile/orders, B GET /services/{A-service-name} returns 404, B GET /services list excludes all A services, missing Bearer on all 3 new routes returns 401, garbage Bearer on all 3 new routes returns 401. seedSpansForTenant and eng.RunOnce calls HOISTED outside t.Run blocks per SLICE-2 T11 lesson. Plus 4 additional integration tests: TestTopoEngine_RunOnce_WritesEdgesAndStats, TestTopoEngine_Idempotency_DoubleRun (ReplacingMergeTree FINAL dedupes), TestTopoEngine_Catchup_FromLastCompleted, TestTopoEngine_CannotWriteEdgeAcrossTenant (reverse write isolation). CI matrix: backend-unit (engine/handler/admin unit tests), backend-integration (5 new integration files), frontend-unit (8 new vitest spec files including TimeWindowPicker suppressNextWatch regression), e2e (make seed-topology + topology.spec.ts + overview.spec.ts + service-detail.spec.ts); lint-ch rule extended for chquery.AdminConn usage location
out_of_scope: ⌘K command palette + services candidates injection (skeleton ADR-0001 §4.4 promised in Slice 0 was YAGNI'd; building skeleton in SLICE-3 adds ~3 tasks — recommend folding into SLICE-3.5 or SLICE-5)
Service detail tabs 3-6 (Runtime/Exceptions/Settings/Alerts) — depend on SLICE-4 metrics and SLICE-5 tenant settings; SLICE-3 ships ComingSoonTab placeholders
True windowed quantile (vs maxIf(p95) per-bucket-max approximation) — requires quantileTDigestState columns in topo-engine writes; folded into SLICE-4 metrics aggregation rework
Separate /services table view — SideBar services shares /overview cards; sortable table view deferred to SLICE-3.5
/api/v1/services/{name}/traces and /logs quick-link endpoints — not needed; SignalsTab links directly to /traces?service=X (filter already supported by SLICE-1/2)
topo-engine HA / leader election — single instance suffices; ReplacingMergeTree tolerates restart re-runs
OPTIMIZE TABLE ... FINAL scheduled job — does not run (too costly); FROM ... FINAL in queries guarantees correctness
Topology node hover tooltip with inbound/outbound split — v1 hover shows current node RED summary only; click navigates to /services/:name for breakdown
Topology time-animation / sliding-window replay — fixed-bucket TimeWindowPicker satisfies ADR-0001 'time window switch with number replay'; continuous animation deferred
External node reverse navigation (external node → trace_id) — external nodes don't map to specific traces; UX deferred
Per-trace Service Map external derivation — peer-attribute inference unstable within single trace; external nodes appear only in global /topology
Proactive 501 stubs for /api/v1/alerts — SLICE-4 adds its own one-line Caddy handle
AsyncInsert / column-mode batch on chquery.Batch — add when throughput data demands
OTel SDK attribute alias normalization (peer.service vs net.peer.name vs server.address) — known_drift for SLICE-3.5
features.notes: Third vertical slice. First slice with a non-OTLP-receiving backend service (cmd/topo-engine). Introduces chquery.AdminConn for the tenant-discovery case (whitelisted SQL only, lint-confined to internal/topoengine/). External node inference via COALESCE on peer attributes is the second-biggest design choice after the 1min job-vs-MV decision. Drift D4 stays closed: zero nginx changes (this is the first slice that proves SLICE-2's promise that future query routes are one-line Caddy adds). ⌘K explicitly de-scoped during brainstorming after discovering the cmd palette skeleton was never built — Q2 'full scope' answer carried the assumption it existed. SLICE-3 plan should target 14-16 tasks (similar to SLICE-1's 16); 21-day estimate (vs ADR-0001's 5-week estimate) reflects two-Pass topo-engine job + shared graph component complexity offset by SLICE-1/2 helpers (chtest, suppressNextWatch pattern, ingestshared) being reusable.
